_comment: Copilot Token Budget MCP server registration.
macOS/Linux: cd phase-4 && go build -ldflags '-X main.Version=v0.1.0' -o ~/bin/copilot-budget-mcp ./cmd/mcp-server
Windows:     cd phase-4 && go build -ldflags '-X main.Version=v0.1.0' -o %USERPROFILE%\bin\copilot-budget-mcp.exe .\cmd\mcp-server
Then set 'command' below to the FULL ABSOLUTE path to the binary on YOUR machine.
IMPORTANT: execve does NOT expand '~' — a leading tilde will fail to launch. Use an absolute path.
The placeholder below (/Users/YOUR_ATTUID/bin/copilot-budget-mcp) must be replaced with your real path.
Windows note: use the .exe suffix and backslashes in the path, e.g.:
